stemHtml: Geometric Dilution of Precision (GDOP) error can be minimized when…

options.a: One satellite is directly overhead and 3 others are close to the horizon 120 degrees apart.
options.b: Three satellites are spaced by 120 degrees in the vertical plane and one satellite is directly overhead.
options.c: Two satellites are spaced by 180 degrees in azimuth, one satellite is directly overhead, and one satellite is directly opposed to the satellite overhead.
options.d: Four satellites are spaced by 90 degrees in azimuth.
